title: [MTR] STAR21 | Class 952-953 Shinkansen
description: Class 952-953 "STAR21" Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the STAR21 (Class 952-953) experimental train to the game.

By default, doors do not open at stations due to the nature of this train.

All nine cars are provided.

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

**Please enjoy it!**
